understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by positioning all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' so that every goal tile is occupied simultaneously, which triggers a WIN for the level and ultimately for the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A single piece is active/selected at a time; movement actions move the selected piece one step in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/obstacles or other immovable tiles. CLICK targets a coordinate to switch selection to (or interact with) another selectable piece at that location, enabling you to reposition multiple pieces in turn; moves that would enter blocked cells or illegal positions result in no movement while still consuming a step from the limited step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by positioning all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' so that every goal tile is occupied simultaneously, which triggers a WIN for the level and ultimately for the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A single piece is active/selected at a time; movement actions move the selected piece one step in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/obstacles or other immovable tiles. CLICK targets a coordinate to switch selection to (or interact with) another selectable piece at that location, enabling you to reposition multiple pieces in turn; moves that would enter blocked cells or illegal positions result in no movement while still consuming a step from the limited step budget.
